skills.name: password-generator
skills.description: Generate cryptographically secure passwords using crypto.getRandomValues(). Supports custom length, character types, bulk generation.

skills.name: qr-code-generator
skills.description: Generate QR codes for URLs, Wi-Fi, email, phone and vCard contacts. PNG and SVG export. Real-time scannability scoring.

skills.name: text-case-converter
skills.description: Convert text between 15 case formats including Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, Slugify and more, with Find & Replace and Custom Terms Override.

skills.name: time-zone-converter
skills.description: Convert times across multiple time zones with DST awareness, meeting overlap grid, and shareable team clock URLs.

skills.name: color-picker
skills.description: Visually pick colors and convert between HEX, RGB and HSL. Generate harmonious palettes, check WCAG contrast ratios, and save color history.

skills.name: gpa-calculator
skills.description: Calculate semester and cumulative GPA using letter grades, percentages or grade points. Supports 4.0 and 5.0 weighted scales.
